entryRequirements.visaNote: Same national Thailand rules as Bangkok — visa-exempt for many nationalities (30-60 days), TDAC digital arrival card required for all.

transportInfo.paymentCard: No unified transit card — Phuket has no metro/rail system
mainSystems: Songthaew (shared pickup trucks, main local transport)
Rented scooters (very common but high accident risk for inexperienced riders)
transportInfo.note: Phuket has no rail transit; getting around relies on songthaews, Grab, or rental scooters — scooter accidents are a leading cause of tourist injury here, wear a helmet and check your travel insurance covers it.

publicHolidays2026: Same national Thai holidays as Bangkok.
majorEventsNote: Songkran and the Vegetarian Festival (Phuket-specific, Sep/Oct, exact date varies) are the two biggest local events.
